identifier.raw:
([Form mode].[Is New mode] 
  || ([SharePoint Columns].[Status] == "Draft") 
  || ([SharePoint Columns].[Status] == "Saved")
|| ([SharePoint Columns].[Status] == "Change Requested"))

formula.raw:
not (contains ([SharePoint Columns].[Status] , "Draft") ||
contains ([SharePoint Columns].[Status], "Saved")||
contains ([SharePoint Columns].[Status], "Change Requested"))

properties.name: Label 2

We have informed the Vendor and they have accepted our General Conditions of purchase.
William Adams Payment Terms are 30 Days from End of Month.

properties.name: BSB
properties.title: BSB
properties.customTextPatternValidationMessage: Please enter BSB in the format 123456 or 123-456

properties.name: BSBsearch_btn
properties.text: 🔍
properties.textTranslation: 🔍

properties.name: richtext_label_10
properties.text:
Note: The vendor’s BSB, account number and account name will only be accepted if the vendor has supplied the information directly.  Vendor’s evidence must be attached.  Acceptable vendor evidence of the bank information must be:
   (a) a vendor’s letterhead, invoice or statement, or
   (b) an email sent directly from the vendor identifying the vendor’s email website
properties.textTranslation:
Note: The vendor’s BSB, account number and account name will only be accepted if the vendor has supplied the information directly.  Vendor’s evidence must be attached.  Acceptable vendor evidence of the bank information must be:
   (a) a vendor’s letterhead, invoice or statement, or
   (b) an email sent directly from the vendor identifying the vendor’s email website
